name: sd_gl_monthly_comp_v2
sql: WITH user_monthly_priority AS (SELECT LEFT(CAST(day AS TEXT), 6) as month, lcm_id, MIN(CASE WHEN user_type = 'nuu' THEN 1 WHEN user_type = 'ruu' THEN 2 WHEN user_type = 'ouu' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END) as final_status_val FROM g63002013.daily_lcx_user_info WHERE day >= 20250301 AND app_id = 63002013 AND is_water = '不是水' GROUP BY 1, 2) SELECT month, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN final_status_val = 1 THEN lcm_id END) as nuu, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN final_status_val = 2 THEN lcm_id END) as ruu, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN final_status_val = 3 THEN lcm_id END) as ouu, COUNT(DISTINCT lcm_id) as mau FROM user_monthly_priority GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;
